sources.page_title: FRA-BER LEGA 750ML Degreaser For Rims & Tires | Garage Equipment Center | GEC Egypt
sources.cleaned_content:
FRA-BER LEGA 750ML Degreaser For Rims & Tires

Images:
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.product/5312/image_1024/%5BCCCCXX00042%5D%20FRA-BER%20LEGA%20750ML%20Degreaser%20For%20Rims%20%26%20Tires?unique=14bf749
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.image/7575/image_1024/FRA-BER%20LEGA%20750ML%20Degreaser%20For%20Rims%20And%20Tyres?unique=4613483
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.template/5312/image_1920?unique=cc6d512

Description:
FRA-BER LEGA 750ML - Professional Rim & Tire Degreaser
FRA-BER LEGA is a high-performance degreaser developed to clean and restore rims, tires, and brake components efficiently. Its advanced formula removes grease, brake dust, and stubborn road dirt without damaging or scratching the surface.
Designed for professional use in car wash and detailing centers, it not only brings back a like-new glossy finish but also leaves a protective anti-oxidation layer, helping to prevent corrosion and maintain shine for longer.

Key Features:
- Effectively removes grease, brake dust, and tough dirt
- Safe on all rim brands and finishes
- Restores a clean, shiny appearance
- Leaves a long-lasting antioxidant protective film
- Ideal for professional car wash and detailing applications

Directions for Use:
- Spray directly onto a dry surface.
- Leave for a few seconds to act.
- Rinse thoroughly with water or wipe with a sponge, preferably using high-pressure water for best results.

Price: 185.00 EGP

Availability: The product is available - contact us to get the price.

Internal Reference: CCCCXX00042

Specifications:
- Category: Exterior Chemicals
- Subcategory: Tires & Rims

sources.page_title: Fra-Ber LEGA - Ready-to-use rim cleaner with protective layer - JMProducts
sources.cleaned_content:
Fra-Ber LEGA

Images:
- https://jmproducts.be/cdn/shop/files/70864-lega-750ml-schiuma-900x900.jpg?v=1746377144

Regular price: €9,06 EUR
Taxes included.
Contents: 750ml
Delivery time: 2-5 days

Fra-Ber LEGA is a ready-to-use rim cleaner specially developed to thoroughly clean rims of all car brands without damaging the surfaces. The product effortlessly removes brake dust, brake pad dirt, grease and stubborn deposits, leaving a protective, antioxidant film for extra durability.

Not only will this cleaner restore the pristine shine to your wheels, it is safe to use on all types of finishes, including painted, polished and chromed wheels.

How to use:
- Spray the product on a dry, cold rim
- Leave on for a few seconds
- Clean afterwards with a sponge or soft brush if necessary
- Rinse thoroughly with water, preferably under high pressure
- Do not allow to dry or use on hot surfaces

Specifications:
- Contents: 750 ml spray bottle
- Item Code: 70864
- pH value: 10.52
- Appearance: Clear liquid
- Scent: Characteristic
- Flash point: > 100 °C
- Density: 1.00 g/cm³
- Soluble in water: Yes
- Soluble in oil: Partially

Characteristics:
- Ready to use immediately - no dilution required
- Removes dirt, brake dust and stubborn deposits
- Leaves a protective, antioxidant film
- Does not damage rim surface or brake parts
- Ideal for weekly or intensive cleaning

Hazard information:
- Keep out of reach of children
- Do not use on damaged or sensitive surfaces without testing
- Safety data sheet available on request

Why choose LEGA?
- Ready to use - no hassle with diluting
- Thorough cleaning without damaging sensitive rim surfaces
- Leaves a protective film against oxidation
- Efficient and safe for daily or weekly use
- Handy 750 ml spray bottle

Fra-Ber Lega Wheel and Tyre Cleaner and Degreaser

Images:
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/sgrassatore-e-detergente-gomme-e-pulitore-cerchi-lega-fra-ber.jpg?v=1718631917

- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/lega-modo-d-uso-4.jpg?v=1718631928
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/lega-modo-d-uso-5.jpg?v=1718631928
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/lega-modo-d-uso-6.jpg?v=1718631928
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/lega-modo-d-uso-7.jpg?v=1718631928
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/lega-modo-d-uso-8.jpg?v=1718631928
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/lega-750-ml-indicazioni-sicurezza-1.jpg?v=1718631928

Price: €10,10
Format: 750 ml
Delivery usually in 3-5 days

THE BENEFITS OF LEGA

Lega by Fra-Ber is a degreaser and cleaner for all types of alloy car wheels and a cleaner for all tyre brands and makes.

Main features:
- Cleans even the toughest dirt: it is effective on brake linings, brake dust and stubborn dirt, leaving a protective anti-oxidising film;
- Cleans without corroding: it is gentle and safe on alloy wheels, giving them a polished, shiny new look;
- Suitable for all types of wheels: the product is a specific cleaner for all types of wheels, regardless of the make;
- Multi-purpose: it can be used to clean wheels, tyres and even rubber;
- Foaming Trigger: the 750 ml format has a foam delivery trigger for an even deeper and more intensive cleaning action also on vertical surfaces;
- Suitable for all vehicles: it can be used on all types of vehicles including sports cars, utility vehicles, vans, camper vans, trucks and motorbikes.

LEGA IS IDEAL
- As a single product to clean tyres and wheels;
- To clean and degrease all types of alloy wheels, regardless of their make and model;
- To simply and rapidly eliminate stubborn residue difficult to remove using traditional means, on brake linings for example.

HOW TO USE LEGA
We recommend using Lega as a degreaser and cleaner for wheels and tyres.

Main steps:
- Spray the product onto a dry surface;
- Leave on and if necessary, use a medium-bristle brush to evenly spread the product;
- Rinse, possibly at high pressure, or wipe with a sponge and then rinse.

Use: use the product pure.

SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

Product Code: 70864 - R:10 LEGA 750 ML

Safety Information:
Contains among other ingredients: less than 5%: edta and salts. perfume.
